title: Our Journey
subtitle: A decade of innovation, growth, and trusted partnerships
intro: Since our founding in 2013, Heritage InfoTech has evolved from a boutique IT staffing firm into a full-spectrum technology consulting partner serving Fortune 500 enterprises, healthcare systems, financial institutions, and government agencies across all 50 states.

milestones.title: Company Founded
milestones.description: Shilpa Bhavsar establishes Heritage InfoTech LLC with a vision to deliver people-first technology solutions. Initial focus on IT professional services and contract staffing for Northeast Ohio enterprises.

milestones.title: First Enterprise Clients
milestones.description: Secured inaugural contracts with regional healthcare systems and financial services firms. Built a core team of 25 specialized recruiters and solution architects.

milestones.title: Logistics Solutions Launch
milestones.description: Introduced the Heritage Logistics Application Suite — route planning, fleet optimization, and mobile resource management tools tailored for distribution and field service operations.

milestones.title: National Staffing Expansion
milestones.description: Launched National Recruiting & Delivery, enabling contractor placement across all 50 states. Achieved MSP/VMS supplier status with three major enterprise programs.

milestones.title: Healthcare Vertical Growth
milestones.description: Expanded dedicated healthcare practice serving hospital systems, pharma, and life sciences. Delivered HIPAA-compliant integration and clinical data platform projects for tier-one health networks.

milestones.title: BPO Practice Established
milestones.description: Opened Business Process Outsourcing division with delivery centers supporting front and back-office transformation for financial services and insurance clients.

milestones.title: Microsoft & ERP Partnerships
milestones.description: Formalized Microsoft Technology Solutions practice. Delivered ERP modernization and cloud migration programs for mid-market and enterprise clients.

milestones.title: Remote Workforce Enablement
milestones.description: Rapidly scaled virtual staffing and secure remote infrastructure solutions during global workplace transformation. Supported 40+ clients in zero-trust architecture deployments.

milestones.title: Government Sector Entry
milestones.description: Awarded state and municipal technology contracts including revenue systems modernization and port authority digital infrastructure programs.

milestones.title: AI & Data Analytics Practice
milestones.description: Launched dedicated AI, machine learning, and enterprise data engineering practice. Delivered predictive analytics and intelligent automation for healthcare and financial services clients.

milestones.title: Cybersecurity Division
milestones.description: Hemang Bhavsar leads formation of the Cybersecurity practice, introducing vulnerability assessments, zero-trust frameworks, and security operations consulting for regulated industries.

milestones.title: Quantum Readiness Program
milestones.description: Pioneered Quantum Readiness as a Service — cryptographic discovery, post-quantum risk scoring, and hybrid PQC migration roadmaps for enterprise and government clients.

milestones.title: 500+ Professionals Placed
milestones.description: Surpassed 500 concurrent contractor placements nationwide. Deepened partnerships with Pfizer, Cleveland Clinic, Fidelity, Ryder, and Port Authority of New York & New Jersey.

milestones.title: Next-Generation Consulting Platform
milestones.description: Launching integrated consulting platform combining staffing, logistics, BPO, AI, and quantum-ready cybersecurity under one client engagement model — continuing our mission to innovate, collaborate, and deliver.
